text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Kitasan Black has a number of
victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Trainer, um, there's something I wanna ask!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I've really pushed myself these past three years,
haven't I?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I nod since it's true. She's committed an
unfathomable amount of effort into training, and
the results speak for themselves.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I was just thinking, since I've
accomplished so much and am usually so hard on
myself, that it'd be nice to treat myself too! So...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
How about we go on a hot spring vacation with
that ticket we won at the raffle a while back?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
If you think it's bad for me to get carried away
and have too much fun, I can hold a concert at
the hot spring and call it work!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'll put on a great show for all the visitors there,
so please!
choice_data_list:
You don't have to do that! It's okay to just go
and have fun!

You don't have to do that! It's okay to just go
and have fun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stop Kitasan Black from seriously planning a
concert, and we make it a normal trip to the hot
spring.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh. The water felt so good... My skin and heart
feel so silky smooth...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Man, Trainer, hot springs sure are dangerous...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I usually always stay sharp and focused, but
soaking in there really puts down my guard... For
some reason, I just...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I just wanna let loose today! I wanna be just like a
kid again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the pressure of being a dependable helper to
everyone must be getting to her, which is why
she's craving a break so badly.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Is it okay if I do as I like, Trainer? Just for today.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't want other people to see me slacking
off, but you're different, so I don't mind.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yaaay! Thank you! Don't judge me too harshly for
being a little lazy, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Kitasan Black metaphorically lets down
her hair and enjoys herself to her heart's content.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
T-Trainer... I-I stayed in the bath too long... The
spin is worlding...
choice_data_list: H-how long were you in there?!
H-how long were you in there?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You know that game where you count down from
1,000? I played it by myself... Uuurgh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hurriedly grab a cold towel and place it on her
forehead. After that...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Pheeew! Shouldn't have eaten that last one... I've
always held back during meals so I can run
without issue, but this was just too good...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Look, Trainer! They've got desserts, too! I'm
really craving a Japanese-style dessert!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Anything goes today, right? Can I order some?
You gave me permission to go all out earlier,
y'know.
choice_data_list: Go ahead. Just don't eat yourself into a coma.
Go ahead. Just don't eat yourself into a coma.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yay! Here I go, then! I'll have the shaved ice with
green tea syrup and red beans, topped with
condensed milk and extra sweet dumplings!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black continues to indulge on her every
whim...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hot springs are just the best! I feel so satisfied
right now!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I can't usually let loose like this, but maybe this is the real me.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah! Trainer, why don't we do a festival
dance right now?
choice_data_list: You want to do a festival dance?! In this room?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I only ever get to do Western style dances
on stage, so I really miss doing traditional
Japanese ones.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Please? Pretty please with a glazed carrot on top!
I promise it'll be fun!
choice_data_list: All right. Let's do it, then.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Trainer! I knew you wouldn't let me down.
Come on!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yoyoi no yoi! Yoyoi no yoi!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black is usually reserved and never asks
for anything, but she's like a different person
today with how carefree and exuberant she is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Kitasan Black and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
